h1.visual_description: All-caps, sans-serif font, light blue/lavender color, increased letter spacing, left-aligned.
h1.example_text: THE TEXTBOOK’S DIFFERENT LEVELS OF RIGOR

h2.visual_description: Not present in sample, but likely a smaller version of H1 or bold serif based on academic styling.

visual_matchers.pattern: Superscript numbers in body text corresponding to bottom-of-page blocks.
Italicized Latin phrases or species names.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Scientific/Technical terminology (e.g., Homo sapiens, inter alia)

visual_matchers.pattern: Small-caps or distinct sans-serif font at the very bottom of the page.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX inline for variables and superscripts (e.g., $n^{th}$), though the text describes mathematical rigor, no complex block equations are present in this sample.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Bottom-left corner contains page-specific metadata: Roman numeral page numbers followed by author name (e.g., 'XX ARTHUR J. CAPLAN'). Footnotes are separated from the main body by a short horizontal rule or whitespace at the bottom.
